pi_items.source: Task description explicitly specifies 'Create a new Badge Template named Parking Permit'.
Task description explicitly specifies 'Add a new text field named License Plate'.
Task description explicitly specifies 'Add large static text: PARKING PERMIT'.
Derived from the requested template name and confirmed by export_result.sh which searches for files matching 'Parking Permit*'.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly require creating a badge template named 'Parking Permit', adding a database field named 'License Plate', and including the exact static text 'PARKING PERMIT' on the badge layout. These literal strings are the ground truth expectations verified by the export script.
